name: Jean B's Strawberry-Rhubarb Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 ½ cups finely chopped strawberries (approximately ¼ to 1/3 inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fruit mixture: Combine the finely chopped strawberries and rhubarb with half a cup of sugar, and let it stand for about 1 hour.
2. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
3. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ¼ cup sugar, white flour, whole wheat flour, wheat germ, baking soda, nutmeg, and salt.
4. Beat the eggs with the olive oil and vanilla in another bowl, then add the fruit mixture and incorporate it into the dry ingredients until just combined.
5. Grease 11-12 muffin cups and fill each one almost to the top with the batter.
6. Bake for approximately 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Serve warm, if desired.
